headline: Starbucks rolls out new incentives to improve service
summary: Two years into a turnaround that has reshaped everything from cup messages to café layouts, Starbucks is now turning its attention to the people making the drinks. As a way to incentivize employees and improve service for customers, Starbucks is expanding opportunities for customers to tip and ...

headline: Starbucks is offering $1,200 bonuses, expanded tipping, and weekly payouts to boost the pay of its U.S. baristas
summary: Starbucks will offer up to $1,200 in bonuses each year and expanded tipping options for its U.S. hourly workers as the company pours $500 million into a turnaround effort.

raw.headline: Starbucks is offering $1,200 bonuses, expanded tipping, and weekly payouts to boost the pay of its U.S. baristas
raw.summary: Starbucks will offer up to $1,200 in bonuses each year and expanded tipping options for its U.S. hourly workers as the company pours $500 million into a turnaround effort.

headline: Starbucks Pay Revamp Tests Link Between Barista Incentives And Margins
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) is rolling out a major compensation revamp for U.S. baristas, including a new performance-based bonus program of up to US$1,200 a year. The company is expanding tipping options on mobile and card payments and introducing weekly pay to give store partners more flexible access to earnings. The package is aimed at improving employee engagement, in store operations, and customer experience at a time of ongoing union activity and margin pressure. For investors following...
